author_rating_explanation: Both focus authors are affiliated with National Yang Ming Chiao Tung University and Hon Hai Research Institute. NYCU is a Taiwanese university not listed in the top-tier bands, and Hon Hai (Foxconn) research institute is not among the major AI companies listed in the 9-10 band. This falls in the 0-5 bucket.
